rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. ELIZABETH JACKSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment For Possession Pursuant To Breach Of Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 14, 2019 line 6. PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC MOTION / Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment For Possession Pursuant To Breach Of Stipulation Hearing Required to (1) address late-file opposition. The Court notes that there is no explanation provided and no leave for late-filed opposition was requested; and (2) all declarants to be present. =(501/CFH)
